    def a_method(p1, p2):
        pass
def spam(a, b, *var, **kw):

    global some_assigned_global_var
    some_assigned_global_var = 12
    bar = 47
    some_var = 10
    x = 23
    glob
    def internal():
        return x
    def other_internal():
        nonlocal some_var
        some_var = 3
        return some_var
    return internal
def foo():
    pass
